Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature

## How was this tested?

Describe the checks you ran. For most changes:

- [ ] `python -m compileall src`
- [ ] `python tests\engine_smoke.py`
- [ ] `npm run lint --prefix frontend`
- [ ] `npm run build --prefix frontend`
- [ ] Manually verified in the running app (if UI/behavior changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused and follows the surrounding code style.
- [ ] I updated docs (`README.md` / `CLAUDE.md`) where relevant.
- [ ] I added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry under **Unreleased** for user-visible changes.
- [ ] I did not commit secrets or local-only paths.
